grace.name: Chance Comet
descs: Upon entering a Shop, gain 1 random Tier 3 or less For Fuse or Sale only E.G.O Gift(s)
Upon entering Floor 3, gain 1 random Tier 3 E.G.O Gift(s)
When fusing, gain a random additional E.G.O Gift 2 Tiers below the Fusion result(must be Tier 3 or higher) (once per Shop)

grace.name: Perfected Possibility
descs: Upon entry, gain 1 Tier 3 E.G.O Gift(s) of your choice for the selected Keyword (if no remaining Gifts meet the conditions, a lower Tier one will appear instead)
